expressions.adf_expression: @concat('{"context":"', concat(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.env,'dev'), '-', coalesce(pipeline().parameters.region,'global')), '","batch":"', coalesce(pipeline().parameters.batch_id, concat('batch-', pipeline().RunId)), '","mode":"', if(equals(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.run_mode,'standard'),'full'),'FULL','INCR'), '","tag":"', concat('env_', coalesce(pipeline().parameters.env,'dev'), '_', if(equals(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.run_mode,'standard'),'full'),'reload','delta')), '"}')
@mul(add(pipeline().parameters.file_count,pipeline().parameters.retry_count),2)
@concat('select ''', pipeline().parameters.source_list, ''' as raw_list, ''', pipeline().parameters.env, ''' as env, ''', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, ''' as batch_id')
@if(and(equals(pipeline().parameters.is_full_load,true),or(equals(pipeline().parameters.env,'prod'),equals(pipeline().parameters.env,'uat'))),'FULL','INCR')

@concat('SELECT ''', pipeline().parameters.env, ''' as env, ''', pipeline().parameters.dataset_name, ''' as dataset_name, ''', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, ''' as batch_id, ''raw/'', ''', pipeline().parameters.env, ''/'', ''', pipeline().parameters.dataset_name, ''/'', ''batch_'', ''', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, ''' as relative_path, ''https://example.contoso.com/adf/notify'' as notify_url, ''success'' as expected_status')
@replace(toLower(trim(pipeline().parameters.source_system)),' ','_')
@string(add(mul(int(pipeline().parameters.base_value),int(pipeline().parameters.multiplier)),int(pipeline().parameters.offset)))
@concat('select ''', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, ''' as batch_id, ''', pipeline().parameters.env, ''' as env')

@if(and(equals(pipeline().parameters.load_type,'full'),or(equals(pipeline().parameters.region,'us'),equals(pipeline().parameters.region,'eu'))),concat('/data/',pipeline().parameters.env,'/alternate_source/',pipeline().parameters.region,'/',pipeline().parameters.entity,'/full/',pipeline().parameters.batch_id),concat('/data/',pipeline().parameters.env,'/standard_source/',pipeline().parameters.entity,'/',pipeline().parameters.load_type,'/',pipeline().parameters.batch_id))

@concat('select cast(count(1) as varchar(20)) as cnt, ''', pipeline().parameters.env, ''' as env_name, ''', pipeline().parameters.region, ''' as region_name from ctl_batch where batch_id = ''', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, ''' and status in (''READY'',''RETRY'')')
@concat('SELECT TOP 1 ''', pipeline().parameters.source_table, ''' as table_name, ''', pipeline().parameters.env, ''' as env_name, ''', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, ''' as batch_id')
@concat('select top 1 config_json from dbo.pipeline_configs where env = ''', pipeline().parameters.env, ''' and config_name = ''', pipeline().parameters.config_name, ''' for json path')

@concat('select ''', pipeline().parameters.env, ''' as env, ''', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, ''' as batch_id, ''', pipeline().parameters.manifest_path, ''' as manifest_path, ''', pipeline().parameters.sink_name, ''' as sink_name')

@concat('{"env":"', pipeline().parameters.env, '","requestId":"', pipeline().parameters.request_id, '","lookupRows":', string(activity('Lookup_complex_context').output.value), ',"pipelineMeta":', string(pipeline()), ',"triggerMeta":', string(trigger()), ',"notes":{"stress":"unsupported_types","focus":"activity_coverage"}}')
@pipeline().parameters.notebook_path
@concat('select top 1 ''', pipeline().parameters.source_dataset, ''' as source_name, ''', pipeline().parameters.schema_mode, ''' as schema_mode, ''', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, ''' as batch_id')
@concat('select top 1 config_name, route_value from app_config where env = ''', pipeline().parameters.env, ''' and config_name = ''', pipeline().parameters.config_name, '''')

@concat('SELECT ''', pipeline().parameters.file_list_path, ''' as listPath, ''', pipeline().parameters.target_container, ''' as targetContainer, ''dbo.TableA'' as sourceTable, ''/mnt/raw/a'' as nestedPath, ''delta.table_a'' as nestedTarget UNION ALL SELECT ''', pipeline().parameters.file_list_path, ''',''', pipeline().parameters.target_container, ''',''dbo.TableB'',''/mnt/raw/b'',''delta.table_b''')
@concat('select ''', pipeline().parameters.env, ''' as env, ''', pipeline().parameters.config_key, ''' as config_key, getdate() as extracted_at')
@concat('select ''', pipeline().parameters.env, ''' as env, ''', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, ''' as batch_id, ''', pipeline().parameters.manifest_path, ''' as manifest_path, 3 as item_count')
@concat('SELECT CAST(0x89504E470D0A1A0A AS varbinary(max)) AS src_col, ''', pipeline().parameters.source_path, ''' AS source_path, ''', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, ''' AS batch_id')

@concat('SELECT ''', pipeline().parameters.env, ''' as env, ''', pipeline().parameters.query_name, ''' as query_name, ''{"meta":{"shape":"', pipeline().parameters.expected_shape, '","node":{"id":7,"tags":["alpha","beta"]}},"items":[{"name":"first"},{"name":"second"}]}'' as payload')
@concat(pipeline().parameters.endpoint,'?env=',pipeline().parameters.env,'&request_id=',pipeline().parameters.request_id,'&format=xml')
@pipeline().parameters.items_source

@concat('select ''', pipeline().parameters.env, ''' as env, ''', pipeline().parameters.rule_set, ''' as rule_set, ''', pipeline().parameters.execution_id, ''' as execution_id for json path, without_array_wrapper')
@concat('env=', pipeline().parameters.env, ';mode=', pipeline().parameters.payload_mode, ';job=', pipeline().parameters.job_id)
@concat('SELECT COUNT(1) AS row_count FROM ', pipeline().parameters.source_dataset, ' WHERE env = ''', pipeline().parameters.env, '''')
@concat(pipeline().parameters.endpoint,'?env=',pipeline().parameters.env,'&batch=',pipeline().parameters.batch_id)

@concat('select case when ''', pipeline().parameters.lookup_mode, ''' = ''single'' then 1 else 2 end as row_id, ''', pipeline().parameters.env, ''' as env_name from ', pipeline().parameters.control_table)

@concat('{"env":"', pipeline().parameters.env, '","batch":"', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, '","unsupported":{"mapLike":"a:b:c","binaryLike":"0xDEADBEEF","nestedArray":"[1,{x:y}]","endpoint":"', pipeline().parameters.endpoint, '"}}')
